File:Albert Einstein (Nobel).png: Albert Einstein, official 1921 Nobel Prize in Physics photograph.
File:Stylised atom with three Bohr model: Stylised atom. Blue dots are electrons, red dots are protons and black dots are neutrons.
File:Modernphysicsfields.svg: A simplified view on fields of modern physics theories. Please note that from a historical point of view, this diagram is very simplified. In fact, when quantum mechanics was originally formulated, it was applied to models whose correspondence limit was non-relativistic. Many attempts were made to merge quantum mechanics with special relativity with a covariant equation such as the[Dirac equation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dirac_equation). These days, relativistic quantum mechanics is now abandoned in favour of the quantum theory of fields.
File:Black body.svg: Black body spectral radiance curves for various temperatures after Planck, and comparison with the classical theory of Rayleigh-Jeans \(in cgs units\).
File:Symbol category class.svg: Symbol for Category-Class on the English Wikipedia
